Phil's security company faced challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic but pivoted successfully to provide social distance monitoring services, leading to significant revenue growth. Despite increasing demand, cash flow constraints hinder further expansion. Phil emphasizes his motivation to succeed for his family and seeks guidance on refining his pitch and understanding financial metrics.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions
programme.desc: Chad Honeycutt, owner and CEO of Evidence-Based Classroom Solutions, pitches his business. Chad discusses how his company addresses the deficit in evidence-based services for students with disabilities, particularly autism and emotional disabilities, in public schools. Despite significant revenue growth, Chad seeks investment due to cash flow challenges, primarily caused by delays in insurance reimbursements. The panel expresses concerns about profitability and the need for clearer communication about the company's mission.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Phil Fogarty, owner of PSA Security, discusses his business struggles and funding needs with Joe Camberato, CEO of National Business Capital. Phil's security company faced challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic but pivoted successfully to provide social distance monitoring services, leading to significant revenue growth. Despite increasing demand, cash flow constraints hinder further expansion. Phil emphasizes his motivation to succeed for his family and seeks guidance on refining his pitch and understanding financial metrics.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Kids of Valor Academy
programme.desc: Mona Jackson, owner of Kids of Valor Academy, seeks funding of $600,000 to support her childcare business, which currently operates four locations. Mona shares her inspiring journey, highlighting her commitment to providing affordable childcare in urban areas, driven by her own experiences as a teen mother. She plans to expand her academy to seven locations and aims to create a safe haven for women leaving domestic violence situations. Mona discusses her revenue, profitability, and organizational structure, emphasizing her all-female management team and the positive impact she aims to make in her community.

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: Sun protection and Sunscreens with Dr. Deborah Longwill, Horse therapy to work through relationships with Dr. Shelley Green, Understanding Addiction with Dan Simmons

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Steve Perez pitches his business, Invisishield, which specializes in automotive accessories for OEMs and dealerships. Facing cash flow challenges exacerbated by multiple merchant cash advances, Perez seeks funding to consolidate debt, purchase materials, and acquire equipment.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: John Comack, owner of Green Energy Technology, a company specializing in EV charging stations, seeks funding to expand his business. With a vision for growth and a turnkey solution approach, John impresses the panel with his strategic mindset and grasp of the market.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Dan Notartomaso seeks $650,000 in funding for his companies, Peak Custom Construction and Oak and Iron Design Co. As Dan unveils his unique niche in high-end home remodels catering to professional athletes, the panel of experts delve into his ambitious plans and financial challenges. With rapid growth during the pandemic, Dan grapples with cash flow issues and the need for strategic investment.

programme.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
programme.sub-title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Julia Dorny
programme.desc: Over 800 Fights in her Life Professional MMA Fighter Julia Dorny, What get in Martial Arts when you train in over 6 Arts, you get the professional MMA Fighter in Julia Dorny! She is humble and amazing and is training for her upcoming fights. She is a podcaster with her show Women Hit Harder! Get ready and get involved in the conversation!

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Mother-daughter duo Tosha Wright and Lisa Dunnigan from Teach Your Heart Out seek $600,000 in funding to propel their educational conference business to new heights. With a mission to rejuvenate and empower educators nationwide, they share their inspiring journey and ambitious plans with the panel of experts. Despite facing challenges such as the impact of COVID-19 on educational conferences and the need for strategic expansion, Tosha and Lisa impress with their passion and dedication to their cause.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Dr. Don Wood, CEO and founder of the Inspired Performance Institute, seeks funding to scale his groundbreaking trauma resolution program. With a mission to revolutionize mental health treatment, Dr. Wood's program, TIPP, boasts a remarkable 90% success rate in alleviating post-traumatic stress, anxiety, and depression. Rooted in his personal journey to save his daughter from chronic illness, Dr. Wood's method resets the mind's response to trauma, yielding rapid and lasting results in just four hours. Despite financial challenges, Dr. Wood's vision to reach millions drives his pursuit of strategic partnerships and media exposure, highlighting the transformative potential of his innovative approach to healing.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Restaurant owner Eldridge Williams takes center stage, seeking $750,000 to propel his beloved establishment, The Delta, to new heights. With a vibrant personality and a deep passion for hospitality, Eldridge shares his journey from Memphis to Chicago, where he crafted The Delta's unique ambiance inspired by the Mississippi Delta's culture. Despite facing challenges, including the impact of COVID-19 on revenue, Eldridge's vision for scalability shines through, anchored by his signature dish, tamales.

programme.title: Health Insiders
programme.desc: DR. LAUREN CARCAS - Breast Cancer Risk Factors DR. MARK DYLEWSKI - Lung Cancer Screenings DR GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Back Pain

programme.title: Health Insiders
programme.desc: DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Causes of Back Pain TORRE WASHINGTON - Bodybuilding (Torre Washington’s story) VICKIE ZAMORA - Occupational Therapy for Children

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: John and Chelsea Jubilee from Energized Health seek $1 million to grow their thriving health business. With their unique scientific protocol targeting intracellular hydration, they aim to address the root cause of illness and disease. As the panel examines the intricacies of their business, including financials and expansion plans, concerns emerge regarding the practicality of rapid scaling, leading to a concentrated discussion on optimizing cash flow and enhancing profitability within the existing framework through marketing refinement and potential subscription models.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Jeremiah Ramirez, founder of The Marathon Group, seeks $750,000 to propel his financial brokerage dedicated to promoting financial literacy and insurance sales. Despite Ramirez's personal drive stemming from past hardships, the panelists question the feasibility of his plan, particularly his proposal to cover agents' continuing education costs.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.desc: Matthew Aarsvold, the owner and president of IKW Solutions, takes center stage, seeking $1,000,000 to elevate his innovative software, Constantly Current. This cutting-edge prototype promises to transform Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems by ensuring they remain updated seamlessly, offering potential time and cost savings for businesses.

programme.title: Fund Tank
programme.sub-title: Fund Tank - Your Animals Best Friend
programme.desc: Sherri Loomer seeks $100,000 to elevate her cherished venture, Your Animal's Best Friend, to the next level. With a profound dedication to animal care, Sherri outlines her company's journey, emphasizing its mission to offer unparalleled pet services. Despite hurdles, such as a steep rent hike, overcoming breast cancer, and the necessity for more staff, Sherri's commitment to her enterprise is evident.

programme.title: The Inspiration Show
programme.sub-title: Dr. Joe Dispenza & The Science Behind the Law Of Attraction
programme.desc: Dr. Joe Dispenza shares the simple steps anyone can follow to trigger a mystical, transcendental, life-changing state of higher consciousness.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: Cynthia Kersey, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Blaine Bartlett, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: CPR Training with Fire Dept. Cpt. Patrick Bayne, Staying Active with Dr. Lisa Corsa,

programme.title: Health Insiders
programme.desc: WILBERT FUERTE & MAYRET GONZALEZ - Penicillin Allergy DR. ALVARO GOMEZ & ANN DEVELASCO - Women & Heart Disease DR. MARCIO FAGUNDES - Proton Therapy

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli
programme.desc: With Hurricane Elsa fast approaching off the Jersey shore, Kyle Troup, the 2021 Pro Bowling Players Championship winner, and Ike switch it up and set out on a saltwater, multi-species challenge in an attempt to beat the storm. The popular two-handed bowler with the big personality and bigger hair is a fishing newby. With a storm approaching, can the two get it done and complete the challenge? Day two is spent in Kyle’s territory, the bowling alley. Can Ike throw the bowling ball like he can cast a line?

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli
programme.desc: UFC fighter Jim Miller, winningest UFC MMA lightweight division fighter trains Ike in his best moves to face off in the octagon. Any bets on who gets choked out? Will Ike remember the moves or run screaming from the fight? With an amazing fishery nearby, the two brave the wild to explore what was once one of Ike’s favorite childhood fishing holes...does it live up to his memory or do they leave empty handed?

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli
programme.desc: Keyshawn Whitehorse, professional bull rider ranked 8th in the PBR world circuit teaches Ike the ropes in a quick training session before mounting a bull at the Cowtown Rodeo in Southern NJ. Does Ike have what it takes to last the eight seconds, or will he be fishing from a seated position the rest of his life? Day two is spent fishing a multi species challenge at a local lake. Does Keyshawn’s trout fishing experience give him a leg up in succeeding at this challenge?

programme.title: My World With Mike Iaconelli
programme.desc: With a break in her golf schedule, Marina Alex, an LPGA tour pro and New Jersey native, pairs up with Mike to see if she can get a fish in the boat as they navigate the waters of the Upper Delaware River. On day two, Marina and Mike head over to Harkers Hollow Golf Club for a Par 3 Challenge. Will he be able to stay on course or will he drift towards the pond?

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Kyle Barefield of All Things Hunting and Willi Schmidt of Pure Hunting share their personal stories of how hunting has been an integral part of their lives, passed down through generations. While their beginnings and experiences are very different, they find common ground in the heritage of Browning Firearms with memorable whitetail hunts in Louisiana and Montana.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Kyle Barefield and Cole Barthel of All Things Hunting Scout, Prepare and Execute a late season duck hunt in a Cypress Break in the State of Louisiana. A successful duck hunt takes three things to accomplish, Great Gear, Hard Work, Finding where the ducks want to be, and this hunt has them all.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: The guys at Slade Northwest head to Western Washington.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Join Willi Schmidt & his good friends as they hunt Nebraska's North Platte for waterfowl.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Stalk the hills of Utah in search of mule deer as nature’s most scenic canvases go on full display.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Slade Northwest heads to Montana for some goose.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Nellie the dog saves Stefan’s life from a crane as the guys are down in Lubbock Texas.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Late season goose hunting in Kansas with Slade Northwest.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.sub-title: "The Choice — Last Hour Iowa Whitetail Bruiser"
programme.desc: Ralph’s Iowa buck dreams come true, in a big way, in the last hour of his hunt.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Country star Meghan Patrick and her love of hunting and the outdoors.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: The All Things Hunting team burning gun powder in the frost on some great Texas whitetail bucks.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Meet Danny Pruitt as he shows off his home town. Fishing for pan fish and showing off what Dawsonville, GA has to offer.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Great views, Food and people. Danny learns to fly fish on the iconic Madison River in Ennis, Montana.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: The Montana adventure continues on private lakes targeting trophy trout. This is where fish stories are born.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny meets up with Jeff Coffee of ZOE angling group to talk shop, tie flies and fish in one of the most biodiverse lakes in the country.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny meets up with Chef Dave in the Golden Ilse to target Reds and Trout. Then head to Halyards to cook the catch.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny tries his hand at the seine net to catch some shrimp. Then meets up with Chef Dave to cook up some amazing Shrimp and Grits. After, Travel to Jekyll Island for the Shrimp and Grits Festival.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Denise Sanchez was awarded a hunt at G2 following our Hunters Extravaganza drawings. Its great to get to spend time on the ranch with new members of TTHA. Denise gets familiar with a giant and learns about new technology while on this hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our college chapters. Hudson has been a long time member of TTHA as well as serving with the Texas A&M Chapter. We have a great time at G2 in pursuit of Axis deer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Over the years we have been able to hunt with a lot of amazing people. This episode takes us to Las Palmas ranch to hunt with Payton Angelle. Payton was awarded this hunt from the amazing people over at Sky High for kids.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Cable is a huge supporter of Texas Hunting and everything Teas Trophy Hunters. We are blessed to spend a few days with hum at the beautiful Saddle Creek Ranch in Brady Texas. Greg has a tight management plan and we are glad we got to enjoy his ranch with him and his team.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they chase Whitetails at Morrow Ranch. This is a hunt that they had purchased earlier at the Disabled Outdoorsman in the year to be able to spend some time in the woods. A few days away to relax and spend quality time with loved ones should always be a priority. Morrow Ranch is definitely a go to place for low fence Texas hunting.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: WE join Bobby Falkenberg as he joins Bret Ferguson from Double T Outfitters. Bobby is an avid outdoorsman, judge, and father of 5. Bret manages 30,000 acres in Ozona TX, the knowledge he has of every inch of this amazing low fence ranch is remarkable. Bobby has an action packed 2 day hunt.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We love our members. We spent some time in camp with Ron Chandler. Ron Recently renewed his TTHA Membership in 2022 and was awarded a member hunt for 2023. We spend time reflecting on what hunting means to Ron and spending time in camp at G2 with hunters alike.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: This spring, our crew was able to dive into some turkey hunting at the G2 ranch with long time TTHA Members Mike Reeber and Dan Marcasol. After a slow start, the crew was finally able to connect on a great Rio Tom and a few hogs. Learning and sharing the stories of TTHA members is something we strive to do each year.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: In 2010, Amberly Snyder’s life changed forever when an accident left her paralyzed from the waist-down. Her comeback story not unlike something you’d see in a movie…in fact it inspired one. Disabled Outdoorsmen USA contacted TTHA and set up this hunt and we were fortunate enough to be able to capture just some of Amberly’s story and her harvest of a beautiful Axis buck at the G2 Ranch in the spring of 2022.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Six Mile Hill Ranch in Crowell, TX plays host to our TTHA Crew this week while we learn how Courtney Shaheen grew up in the outdoors and ultimately pursued her career as a Taxidermist. Courtney shares her path to becoming a world class taxidermist with Double Nickel Taxidermy and she even gets to take her biggest buck to date with the Six Mile Hill crew!

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Josh Kinser from Big and J introduced his daughters to hunting throughout South TX. With trips earlier in the year cancelled, Josh and Hattie were invited to join the TTHA crew at G2 ranch. The first night of the hunt proved to be a success for Hattie, wrapping a TX tag around her biggest buck. Josh and Hattie will have memories to last a lifetime after this hunt!

programme.title: saltwater experience
programme.sub-title: Saltwater Experience - "Everglades With Dave Denkert – Part 2"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by long-time Florida Keys flats guide Dave Denkert and the three hunt for game fish in the Flamingo area of the Everglades.

programme.title: saltwater experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor get caught up in the action with some exciting Jack Crevalle fishing in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: saltwater experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take advantage of a small amount of available time to cruise the nearby honey holes for a variety of game fish.

programme.title: saltwater experience
programme.sub-title: Saltwater Experience - "Everglades Bounce with Paul Ross"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by the young up-and-coming Florida Keys fishing guide Paul Ross as they bounce between a few islands in the Everglades for snook and redfish.

programme.title: saltwater experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor get caught up in the action with some exciting Jack Crevalle fishing in the Florida Keys

programme.title: saltwater experience
programme.sub-title: Saltwater Experience - "Combat Fishing With Hunter Smallback"
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take Hunter Smallback into the Everglades for some snook fishing, and the action really heats up when some hungry Lemon sharks crash the party.

programme.title: Sportsman's Journal
programme.desc: Tyler and Sara spend the last night of the year on the ice chasing crappies after dark!

programme.title: Breaking Boundaries
programme.desc: JP heads to the river looking to trick wary clearwater Steelheads with nothing but artificials.

programme.title: The Reel American Road Trip
programme.desc: Meet Danny Pruitt as he shows off his home town. Fishing for pan fish and showing off what Dawsonville, GA has to offer.

programme.title: Good Fishing
programme.sub-title: Babe Winkelman's "" - "Look Back At Halibut Heaven"
programme.desc: Just for the halibut, we take you back to one of the most exciting episodes of “Good Fishing” of all time. At Dutch Harbor, Alaska, reminisce with us as Babe battles halibut bigger than the size of a regulation pool table.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: In this episode, Captian Mike is fishing with James Kerr in Crystal River.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: In this episode of Local Lines Television, Brandon is fishing with Steve Grant of Diamond Fishing Products.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captains Jonathan Moss and Adam Whitston are together again, pursuing the inshore slam in Crystal River, Florida.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Captain Jonathan Moss travels to Melbourne, on Florida’s Space Coast, to cast flies with Capt. Noah Miler at some unforgettable fish.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Jonathan Moss is in Vero Beach Fl, with Capt. Chris Raimondo skipping docks and mangroves for Snook.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Capt. Jonathan Moss visits St. Marks, Florida, to fish inshore for Cobia and Redfish with Capt. Leif Lundquist.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Deep in the Everglades, Capt. Jonathan Moss and Capt. Skylar Fox are on the hunt for the inshore slam and some hidden treasures of old!

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: Despite forecasted heavy storms, Capt. Jonathan Moss visits North East Florida to fish with Capt. Matt Omlor for crawling Redfish on the Flood Tide.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: In this episode of Flats Class TV Captain C.A. is fishing in Louisiana for Bull Reds.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: In this episode of Flats Class, Captain C.A. is debuting the brand new Power Pole MOVE and fishing for redfish.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: In this episode, Captain C.A. heads over to Mosquito Lagoon and fishes with Captain Justin Price.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: CA puts his skills to the test on the nature coast. When it's "Fishin' Impossible" there's no one better than JC livingston.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: In this episode, Captain C.A. Is fishing with Bob and they're fishing for Gator Trout.

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: Rock bottom and spoons? Sounds like a trip up to Steinhatchee to meet up with Captain Danny Allen!

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.sub-title: "In a Camp Down by the River"
programme.desc: The Duck Camp Dinners crew leaves the bayous and heads down river to Venice, Louisiana where they prepare for their first duck hunt in the delta.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Blake shares a family recipe with the DCD crew, Jean-Paul smokes ducks, and the crew heads out on a wild boar hunt in the marshes surrounding Venice.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: The DCD crew spends a day on the water fishing in an effort to complete the trifecta of a meat haul. Blake shows us where he spent much of his childhood and we get a glimpse of mother natures impact on community.

programme.title: Game Changers - Mark Cuban
programme.desc: Bloomberg Game Changers profiles Dallas Maverick's owner Mark Cuban. See how Cuban spun his love for basketball into a multi-billion dollar enterprise.

programme.title: Princes of the Yen
programme.desc: Set in 20th Century Japan the documentary explores the role and power of Central Banks and how they can be used to change a country's economic political and social structures A documentary adaption off the book by Professor Richard Werner.

programme.title: High Profile Bankers
programme.desc: Finance crissis, managing banks, global economy. Bankers share their experiences.

programme.title: Venezuela and the Cryptocurrency Revolution
programme.desc: This Documentary was put together after my experience in Venezuela and footage from the Dash Venzuela Community The Cryptocurrency revolution already started.

programme.title: Token - Economic System Of The Future?
programme.desc: The world of finance is in a constant state of change. With the advance of digitalization in the 21st century, this process has accelerated rapidly and opened up new opportunities to think about finance differently.

programme.title: The Rise and Rise of Bitcoin
programme.desc: A computer programmer becomes fascinated with the digital currency Bitcoin, and through his involvement in the Bitcoin community, we learn about the impending global impact of this amazing new technology.

programme.title: Financialization of Water
programme.desc: Around the world, demand for water is exploding.

programme.title: The True Cost
programme.desc: The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

programme.title: Unknown Tax Havens
programme.desc: Exposing the secret world of unknown tax havens, a global network of tax-free storage facilities with art and goods for the super-rich - unknown, until now. Freeports at highest security levels. This investigates who's using them, and why.

programme.title: The Street Food Hype
programme.desc: Gourmet sandwiches, salads, cakes and also ethnic cuisine, fried fish, ribs or spleen: these are just some of the recipes offered by the army of four-wheeled chefs that fill the streets.

programme.title: German Dynasties - The Thyssens
programme.desc: The name is a myth. But not only heavy industry, exquisite art and immeasurable wealth are associated with it.

programme.title: Zeitgeist - Addendum
programme.desc: Zeitgeist: Addendum attempts to locate the root causes of the pervasive social corruption, while also offering a solution. This solution is not based on politics, morality, laws, or any other "establishment" notions of human affairs, but rather on a modern, non-superstitious based understanding of what we are and how we align with nature, to which we are a part of. The work advocates a new social system which is updated to present day knowledge, highly influenced by the life long work of Jacque Fresco and The Venus Project.

programme.title: The Economy of Tomorrow
programme.desc: The future is uncertain and full of challenges. How do we rescue our cities and tackle inequalities? How do we deal with an aging future and bridging the gender gap? It's time for some forward thinking.

programme.title: The Bitcoin Dilemma
programme.desc: This Documentary delivers a new installment of the latest developments in Cryptocurrencies, NFT's and DeFi. Created by Futurist and Filmmaker Ian Khan, the Bitcoin Dilemma interviews some of the world's most prolific technology and finance leaders to help understand the future.

programme.title: Most Powerful Bankers - EP 1
programme.desc: About the business savvy bankers of the financial world.

programme.title: Most Powerful Bankers - EP 2
programme.desc: About the business savvy bankers of the financial world.

programme.title: The Spider's Web: Britain's Second Empire
programme.desc: How Britain transformed from an imperial power to a financial power.

programme.title: Sparkling: The Story of Champagne
programme.desc: A love letter to the joys and pleasures of champagne.

programme.title: End Game - Technology
programme.desc: An investigation into the advancements in digital technology unique to the gaming industry. They can either enhance our lives and make the world a better place to live, or we may find ourselves in a dystopian future where we are ruled and controlled by the very technologies we rely on.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.sub-title: Teamwork of the People: Part 2 of 5

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: A Smurf On The Wild Side, Part I
programme.desc: What, or who, is that strange being in the forest? It looks vaguely like a Smurf, but it chatters away like the squirrel that seems to be accompanying it... And why is Papa Smurf talking about the Lost Smurfling?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy Smurf has saved Clumsy from a horrible fate. Clumsy swears eternal devotion to his savior and does his best to repay his debt... With awkward results. A clever scheme is needed to stop Clumsy's well-meant catastrophes...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogapatra, the hideous, bloated, vulgar Queen of the Nile, cannot get to sleep and this causes huge bags under her eyes. Her beauty recipe requires squeezing sleep from Lazy Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy brings a Fuzzle back to the Smurf village where the tiny, loveable creature multiplies and threatens to eat the new dam. Harmony plays his music and the entranced Fuzzles march back into the woods where they attach themselves to an unsuspecting Gargamel.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Each morning, dew is deposited by water sprites on forest leaves. Wait till you see what happens when Scaredy Smurf gets hold of the dew-making magic wand...

programme.title: Handy's Window-Vision
programme.desc: Miner Smurf leaves no stone unturned and this is how he discovers a crystal that transmits images. Thus Handy is able to invent window-vision and, every morning from then on, the Smurfs are able to watch Hefty's workouts, Farmer Smurf's crop reports or even the Brainy Smurf Hour. But would you believe it? The evil wizard Gargamel takes advantage of this image-watching to catch Smurfs!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Magic Sack Of Mr Nicholas
programme.desc: If there is one thing that displeases the evil enchantress Chlorhydris, it's the mirth and love of Christmas. She sets out to kidnap Mr. Nicholas' magic sack, the one in which he carries all the toys that good children receive at Christmas. She doesn't know that a frowning Grouchy Smurf is hiding inside the sack.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills... With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel conjures a spell that makes Puppy think he's a cat. Papa receives a prescription from Homnibus to reverse the spell and all the Smurfs help. As Puppy becomes a dog again, Gargamel gets too close and he becomes a cat.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: All The News That's Fit To Smurf
programme.desc: Curious Smurf has an idea: why not print a sheet with all the Village news? He's sure to interest all his readers of the Smurf Tattler. But things don't go exactly to plan when Papa finds super smurfberries.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha, the repulsive witch, captures the Smurfette. She wants to steal from the little blue beauty her golden hair. Can the Smurfs save their little female companion before it is too late? Can Hogatha grow hair like Smurfette's?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: No one believes Grandpa Smurf when he tells of far-away jungles and savannahs teeming with wild giant cats, striped horses, long-necked leaf-eaters and strange tribes... Only some Smurflings give some credit to his tales. But when Grandpa Smurf hears the sound of the magic Royal Drum in the forest, the one that can tame wild beasts, he sets out to prove that he's not an old addle-brained storyteller.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grandpa's storytelling has to be heard to be believed. It's not so much that he tells tall tales, as long ones, but this time he gets so carried away that the formula on which he is working boils over... This is bad news. It might mean the destruction of the Village by evil aphids...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: How can the Smurfs save this future baby vulture? Right now, it's still in the egg and they must find a way of incubating the bird. And it just happens that the evil wizard Gargamel has found a way of changing himself into a bird to get at the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Brainy and Baby mix up Papa Smurf's formulas, leaving them powerless before an army of hungry locusts unleashed on the forest by Gargamel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Poor Lazy! All he wants is a good night's rest. But no, all the Smurfs throw a party for him and, what's more, he gets dragged into a silly argument about painting giant Bigmouth's toes a bright tangerine red... It's a long, sleepless night for poor Lazy Smurf!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs arrive in Camelot to witness several events: treacherous Morgan Le Fay steals Excalibur, the magic sword, and turns Merlin the Wizard, King Arthur and Lancelot into helpless victims.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Dreamy's wish of becoming an Astrosmurf comes true when Papa Smurf puts him to sleep, magically transforming the landscape and the Smurfs into a space fantasy. Gargamel keeps a close watch on their antics through his crystal ball, but he too falls victim to Papa Smurf's magic and is sent into a thunderstorm.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There isn't a River Smurf anymore: someone has frozen it near its source. The Smurfs go to the Emerald Empress' country to see what the trouble is, and they meet the Patchwork Bear as well as the Iron Pyrites...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: It Came From Outer Smurf
programme.desc: Dreamy wants to encounter beings from outer space so much that no one believes him when he talks of having met one. Yet the arrival of this extraterrestrial is going to wreak havoc in the Smurf Village...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Directing the Smurfs to finish repairing the dam, Papa Smurf takes off on a herb-hunting expedition. While he is gone, Brainy causes havoc when he declares himself King and Papa Smurf returns just in time to save the dam from bursting.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In Holland in the Middle Ages, the Smurfs meet wounded Cupid, who cannot spread love as usual. The Smurfs take over and they meet evil Garg, who looks like someone they know.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Being Papa Smurf has its share of joys but also a few disadvantages. Such as being interrupted every five minutes, even when in the middle of delicate magic experiments. So Papa wonders if it's not possible to be replaced by a decision-taking Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Clumsy Smurf's misadventures take him across a river into Pussywillow Hollow. There he meets the Pixies – charming and shapely beings whose enemies, the Wartmongers, will meet the Smurfs in some unforeseen ways.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A terrible giant called Bigmouth helps Gargamel hunt the Smurfs so he can feast on Soup a la Smurf. Papa Smurf tricks the big monster and then convinces him that Soup a la Gargamel is a far more appetizing dish than smurfy soup.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs' 200-year streak of good luck comes to an abrupt end when Gargamel finds Lady Luck's castle and, after locking her up in a dungeon, proceeds to tamper with her wheel of Fortune. Will the Smurfs remain inactive in the face of such ill luck ?

programme.title: The Magic Earrings
programme.desc: Hogatha manages to obtain the magic golden earrings of Sonoria that will enable her to hear Smurfy voices from afar. Following Lazy's snores, she almost reaches the Smurf Village until Harmony's horn-blasts blow in her earrings and she flies home in a rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grouchy learns that emotions can be great, particularly after the villainess of Chlorhydris creates a heart of ice to magically drain every one of care and love.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Journey To The Centre Of The Smurf
programme.desc: Winter is setting in on the Village of the Smurfs. The little Smurfs are freezing. But what is Clumsy doing with this strange rock he's discovered? And why is Miner Smurf so enthusiastic about their new discovery? Surely, one more addition to Clumsy's rock collection is not worth all this hoopla... The Smurfs will discover danger and surprises when they go underground.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: Revenge Of The Smurfs
programme.desc: A war is raging in the Middle Ages. Knights in armor in hot pursuit inadvertently destroy the Smurfs Village so a small band of Smurfs decide to avenge this wrongdoing. Won't Papa Smurf think this is too human-like a reaction?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Where have all the squirrels gone ? Wild Smurf is a little worried. He’d be more worried still if he knew about the ugly witch Hogatha’s dreadful plan for making herself some hair tonic.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: Cut-Up Smurfs
programme.desc: There's nothing Sassette enjoys more than cutting up paper dolls. She does it with flair and gusto. But Papa Smurf's revitalisation formula somehow gets sprinkled on Sassette's parchment creations with unforeseen results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: Magical Meanie
programme.desc: The Smurfs find a "meanie genie" that refuses to grant them their wishes until they call out the magic word. Unfortunately, Gargamel does some research in his library and finds that "pumpernickel pickles" will send the genie on a magical errand to capture the Smurfs. After Gargamel uses up his three wishes, Papa Smurf sings out the same magic word and the genie has to grant his commands to free the Smurfs, toss Gargamel into the river and bottle himself up forever.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogapatra, the hideous, bloated, vulgar Queen of the Nile, cannot get to sleep and this causes huge bags under her eyes. Her beauty recipe requires squeezing sleep from Lazy Smurf...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: The Magic Egg
programme.desc: Gargamel's magic egg ends up in the Smurf Village where the little blue people make one zany wish after another, causing total chaos. Papa Smurf has to outwit both Gargamel and Bigmouth before his magic potions undo the egg's damage and the smurfyness can return to normal.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lost in the Land of the Mystic Sands, the Smurfs encounter Ali Baba and his band of flying carpet-riding thieves, who steal the Smurfs' most precious possessions...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Trying a new spell on the Smurfs backfires when Gargamel turns himself into stone. The Smurfs are delirious with joy. Their archenemy will make them suffer no more!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Life in the Smurf Village might be more peaceful if Puppy's behavior were a little more considerate. But the little Smurf dog is digging up Smurfette's flowers, dirtying Vanity's new wallpaper or ruining Papa Smurf's experiments. Yet Puppy's going to help the Smurfs out of a trap contrived by Gargamel... Or maybe he won't be disciplined enough...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Posing for a sculpture, especially a huge composition like that of Painter Smurf, is very tiring work, and you can't help moving a little. Now Papa Smurf finds a way to keep the posers perfectly still. There are drawbacks though, as the Smurfs will soon realise...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En la Aldea Pitufo hay un ataque de Mala Suerte y cien Pitufos deben bailar una danza magica para recuperar la buena fortuna, ¡pero solo hay 99 en la aldea! ¿Quien sera el centesimo Pitufo?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El chico del bosque y Laconia, la elfa muda y sorda, preguntan a Papa Pitufo que celebre su boda. Mientras los Pitufos preparan la fiesta bajo las ordenes de Pitufina, Gargamel hace acto de presencia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo lo ha vuelto a hacer. Ahora, ha roto el adorado baston de Abuelo Pitufo. En lugar de admitirlo, convence a los Pitufos para ir a buscar un baston de repuesto al Bosque Encantado...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos aprenden que la mente es mas fuerte que la materia gracias a un enganoso y caro tonico milagroso de un charlatan. Pero Papa Pitufo les hara ver que no es mas que un charlatan.

programme.title: El Pitufo Galante
programme.desc: La reina Agripina no dejara que su hijo, el principe Godofredo, se case con la dulce Priscila. Ella quiere como nuera a una chica que sea capaz de mostrarle algo que nunca antes haya visto. Cuando Hogata se entera y descubre la existencia de Abuelo Pitufo, esta segura de que lograra sorprender a la reina con su captura. Por supuesto, Hogata debe atrapar primero a Abuelo Pitufo...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En la antigua China, la fortuna se esconde en las galletas del Pitufo Goloso, y Pitufo Filosofo es el escritor. Es una oportunidad demasiado buena para hacer travesuras como para que Pitufo Bromista la desperdicie.

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces... pero Pitufo Filosofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papa Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Salomon el adivino posee un amuleto que permite a su portador conocer el futuro. Se lo entrega amablemente (quiza demasiado amablemente) a Pitufo Poeta que, desde ese momento, podra saber que sucedera a continuacion...

programme.title: El Pitufo De Troya
programme.desc: Gargamel, el malvado mago, ha ideado un nuevo plan para capturar a los Pitufos: ha construido una estatua gigante con la forma de Papa Pitufo. Espera que, al verla, los Pitufos lleven la estatua a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un terrible gigante ayuda a Gargamel a capturar a los Pitufos para hacer una rica sopa, pero tendra que enfrentar a Papa Pitufo primero.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Primera Navidad De Bebe Pitufo
programme.desc: La ilusion de Navidad se ve frustrada cuando Chlorhydris hechiza a San Nicolas para que no pueda repartir felicidad en Navidad. Afortunadamente, Papa Pitufo y los demas pitufos consiguen romper el hechizo y devolver la Navidad a su bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel cree que crear a Pitufina fue el peor error de su vida. Pero, si pudiera lograr que recuperara su malignidad original, conseguiria a todos los Pitufos de un plumazo. ¿Volvera Pitufina a comportarse de forma malvada?

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces... pero Pitufo Filosofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papa Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero es el encargado de arreglar todos los desperfectos en la Aldea Pitufa. Pero ¿valoran de verdad los demas Pitufos sus esfuerzos? De ningun modo. Al menos eso es lo que siente Pitufo Carpintero, quien decide abandonar la Aldea Pitufa para siempre e irse a vivir al mar con Marina, la sirena...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo y Bebe Pitufo mezclan las formulas de Papa Pitufo con consecuencias desastrosas, dejandoles a merced de un ejercito de hambrientas langostas que Gargamel ha soltado en el bosque.

programme.title: La Formula Aniquiladora
programme.desc: Existe una palabra magica aterradora. Cuando pronuncias esa palabra hacia algo o alguien, ¡haces que se desvanezca en la nada! ¿Podran los Pitufos anular su malvado poder antes de que Gargamel se apropie de ella?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Poeta y Pintor se sienten poco valorados y huyen a una isla tormentosa sin saber que Gargamel los sigue hasta alli.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿Que, o quien, es ese extrano ser que hay en el bosque? Se asemeja vagamente a un Pitufo, pero castanetea los dientes como la ardilla que parece acompanarle... ¿y por que habla Papa Pitufo acerca del Pitufito Perdido?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay algun tipo de poder maligno en la corona del Titan que Minero encuentra bajo tierra, y Avaricioso acaba sucumbiendo a el. Cuando Gargamel aparece con una de sus fechorias en mente, todo se acaba enrevesandose.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Fortachon se disfraza de Pitufina para atraer a Piltkin, el gnomo que se ha enamorado de ella, y alejarlo de la Aldea Pitufa. Excavan bajo tierra y conocen a una gnoma que se enamora de Piltkin, quien se olvida de Pitufina y pasa a tener ojos solo para su nueva conquista.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha salvado a Pitufo Torpe de un terrible destino. Pitufo Torpe jura devocion eterna a su salvador y se esfuerza al maximo por saldar su deuda... con consecuencias desastrosas. Se hace necesario idear un plan ingenioso para evitar las bienintencionadas catastrofes causadas por Pitufo Torpe...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogapatra, la espantosa, hinchada y vulgar reina del Nilo, no puede dormir y eso hace que le aparezcan grandes ojeras. Su receta para la belleza incluye exprimir a Pitufo Perezoso para extraerle sueno...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Tontin lleva una Rebotilla al pueblo, donde la pequena y adorable criatura se multiplicara y amenazara con comerse la nueva presa. Pitufo Armonia toca una cancion y las Rebotillas encandiladas le siguen en fila india hasta el bosque donde se juntaran a Gargamel.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presion y decide huir en busca de inspiracion. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivacion debe nacer del corazon, y nunca de la obligacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Dia de los Inocentes Pitufo resulta no ser tan divertido cuando Gargamel se pone un disfraz de Pitufoarbusto para capturar al pequeno Pitufo Feliz. Papa Pitufo pide ayuda a Pitufopluma para que llame a los pajaros y ataquen al falso arbusto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada manana, los duendecillos del agua depositan rocio sobre las hojas del bosque. No imaginas todo lo que ocurrira cuando Pitufo Miedoso se transforme con la varita magica que crea las gotas de rocio...

programme.title: La Pitufivision De Genio
programme.desc: Pitufo Minero rebusca bajo todas las piedras y, gracias a ello, descubre un cristal que transmite imagenes. Esto permite a Pitufo Carpintero inventar la pitufivision y, desde ese momento, los Pitufos pueden ver todas las mananas los entrenamientos de Pitufo Fortachon, los informes de las cosechas de Pitufo Labrador e incluso el programa de Pitufo Filosofo. Pero ¿quien podria haberlo imaginado? ¡El malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la pitufivision para atrapar Pitufos!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Costal Magico De Santa Claus
programme.desc: Si hay algo que desagrada a la malvada hechicera Clorhidris es la bondad y el amor propios de la Navidad. Trama un plan para robar el costal magico de Santa Claus, en el que transporta todos los juguetes que los ninos que se han portado bien reciben por Navidad. Sin embargo, no sabe que un enfurrunado Pitufo Grunon esta escondido dentro del saco.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se daran cuenta de que se convertira en una especie de mama pitufo para todos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demas Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males...con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Salomon el adivino posee un amuleto que permite a su portador conocer el futuro. Se lo entrega amablemente (quiza demasiado amablemente) a Pitufo Poeta que, desde ese momento, podra saber que sucedera a continuacion...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presion y decide huir en busca de inspiracion. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivacion debe nacer del corazon, y nunca de la obligacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Pitufo Carpintero se encuentra con una anciana trol en el bosque, que le suplica que le ayude a librarse de un grano rojo que tiene en la nariz... ¡dandole un buen puntapie! Pitufo Carpintero la ayuda sin mucho convencimiento. Y el resultado resulta sorprendente para el.

programme.title: El Pitufo Reportero
programme.desc: Pitufo Curioso ha tenido una idea: ¿por que no imprimir un boletin con todas las noticias de la aldea? Esta seguro de que sus cotilleos sobre los Pitufos interesaran a todos los lectores. Pero las cosas no salen exactamente segun lo previsto cuando Papa Pitufo encuentra superpitufrutas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La repulsiva bruja Hogata captura a Pitufina. Quiere robarle a la pequena belleza azul su cabello dorado. ¿Conseguiran salvar los Pitufos a su pequena companera antes de que sea demasiado tarde? ¿Lograra Hogata una cabellera como la de Pitufina?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Nadie le cree al Abuelo Pitufo cuando habla de junglas y sabanas lejanas, repletas de gatos salvajes gigantes, caballos a rayas, comedores de hojas de cuello largo y extranas tribus... Tan solo algunos Pitufitos dan cierto credito a sus historias. Pero, cuando Abuelo Pitufo escucha en el bosque el sonido del tambor real magico, un instrumento capaz de domar bestias salvajes, se lanza a la aventura para demostrar que no es un contador de historias al que el cerebro le juega malas pasadas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las historias de Abuelo Pitufo resultan increiblemente inverosimiles. Y lo peor no es que cuente largas e increibles historias, sino que esta vez se entusiasma tanto con ellas que la formula en la que esta trabajando se sobrecalienta... y eso son malas noticias. Podria significar la destruccion de la aldea a manos de las malvadas pulgas glotonas...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el Pitufo Filosofo pierde sus gafas deja caer las cosas, tropieza con los objetos, y se convierte en tan patoso como el Pitufo Tontin, que ahora tiene que leer a Filosofo y ayudarle a manejarse. Esta experiencia hace que Filosofo se sienta culpable por la forma en la que siempre se ha burlado de Tontin. Una vez que recibe un nuevo par de gafas, le trata con mas respeto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Falso Y El Feo Plumaje
programme.desc: ¿Que pueden hacer los Pitufos para salvar a este futuro pollo de buitre? Ahora mismo, aun esta en el huevo y deben encontrar la forma de incubarlo. Y sucede que el malvado mago Gargamel ha encontrado una forma de transformarse en un ave para acercarse a los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel infecta de odio el corazon de Pitufo Fortachon y, a continuacion, usa al pequeno Pitufo como senuelo para los demas. Afortunadamente, el amor de Pitufo Fortachon vence al odio y ayuda a sus pequenos amigos a escapar de las garras de Gargamel.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo y Bebe Pitufo mezclan las formulas de Papa Pitufo con consecuencias desastrosas, dejandoles a merced de un ejercito de hambrientas langostas que Gargamel ha soltado en el bosque.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Una Fiesta De Pijamas Para Perezoso
programme.desc: ¡Pobre Pitufo Perezoso! Todo lo que desea es una buena noche de descanso. Pero no: todos los Pitufos celebran una fiesta en su honor y, lo que es peor, se ve arrastrado a una absurda discusion sobre pintar los dedos de los pies de Giganton de un brillante color mandarina. ¡Va a ser una larga noche en vela para el pobre Pitufo Perezoso!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El chico del bosque y Laconia, la elfa muda y sorda, preguntan a Papa Pitufo que celebre su boda. Mientras los Pitufos preparan la fiesta bajo las ordenes de Pitufina, Gargamel hace acto de presencia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos llegan a Camelot, donde presencian varios sucesos: la traicionera Morgana Le Fey roba Excalibur, la espada magica, y transforma al mago Merlin, al rey Arturo y a Lancelot en indefensas victimas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Sonador vera cumplido su deseo de ser un Astropitufo cuando Papa Pitufo le hechiza para quedarse dormido, transformando el paisaje y a los Pitufos en una fantasia galactica. Gargamel vigila de cerca las travesuras de los Pitufos desde su bola de cristal, pero el hechizo de Papa Pitufo tambien tiene efecto en el y le transporta hasta el centro de una tormenta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El rio Pitufo ha desaparecido: alguien lo ha congelado cerca de su nacimiento. Los Pitufos viajan hasta el pais de la Emperatriz Esmeralda para descubrir cual es el problema y se encuentran con el Oso Parches y los Piratas de Hierro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebataran todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo... hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Sonador desea encontrar vida extraterrestre pero en la Aldea se burlan de el. Nadie le creera cuando les diga que ha hablado con un ser de otro planeta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Papa Pitufo deja a los Pitufos reparando la presa del pueblo mientras el se va de excursion en busqueda de hierbas para sus pociones. Mientras esta fuera, Pitufo Filosofo provoca un revuelo al declarase a si mismo Rey y Papa Pitufo regresa a tiempo para evitar que la presa se destruya.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las preocupaciones de Papa Pitufo hacen que le salgan verrugas. La unica forma de librarle de esta enfermedad causada por la indecision es que frote el cuerno de uno de los Verrugosos, los desalinados, viscosos, estupidos y brutales enemigos de las haditas del Bosque de los Sauces...

programme.title: El Pitufo Osado
programme.desc: Esta vez, Gargamel tiene un plan infalible. Sin hacer caso de la risa burlona de Azrael, el malvado hechicero ha perfeccionado una sustancia magica a la que ha llamado «polvo temerario», que convertira a todos los Pitufos en temerarios e intrepidos aventureros. ¿Caera Papa Pitufo en la trampa de Gargamel? ¿Atrapara su enemigo a todos los Pitufos? ¿Tendra esta historia un final feliz?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En Holanda, en la Edad Media, los Pitufos se topan con Cupido, que esta herido y no puede propagar el amor como de costumbre. Los Pitufos ocupan su lugar y se encuentran con el malvado Garg, que se parece a alguien que conocen.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Ser Papa Pitufo da muchas alegrias, pero tambien tiene algunas desventajas. Por ejemplo, que alguien te interrumpa cada cinco minutos, incluso cuando estas en medio de delicados experimentos magicos. Eso hace que Papa Pitufo se plantee si seria posible que un Pitufo le sustituyera y se encargara de tomar las decisiones...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Patoso y sus desventuras le llevan a traves de un rio a un lugar desconocido. Alli conoce a las duendecillas, unas adorables criaturitas cuyos enemigos acabaran encontrandose con los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado primo del Rey, Malcolm, lo ha convertido en un ciervo negro para poder acabar con el y ponerle en su sala de trofeos. Los Pitufos iran a ayudar a su amigo y, tras devolver al Rey a su verdadera forma, Malcom acabara preso dentro del cuerpo del ciervo negro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un terrible gigante ayuda a Gargamel a capturar a los Pitufos para hacer una rica sopa, pero tendra que enfrentar a Papa Pitufo primero.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La racha de 200 anos de buena suerte de los Pitufos se interrumpe bruscamente cuando Gargamel encuentra el castillo de la Dama de la Fortuna, la encierra en una mazmorra y comienza a manipular su rueda de la suerte. ¿Se quedaran de brazos cruzados los Pitufos ante ese cambio de fortuna?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogata consigue los pendientes dorados magicos de Sonoria, que le permitiran oir las voces de los Pitufos desde lejos. Siguiendo los ronquidos de Pitufo Perezoso, esta a punto de llegar hasta la Aldea Pitufa, pero entonces los sonidos del cuerno de Pitufo Armonia comienzan a resonar en sus pendientes y huye enfurecida de vuelta a casa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Grunon aprende que las emociones pueden ser fantasticas, sobre todo despues de que la malvada Clorhidris cree un corazon de hielo para despojar a todos de la bondad y el amor.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Viaje Al Pitufo De La Tierra
programme.desc: El invierno ha llegado a la Aldea Pitufa. Y los pequenos Pitufos estan helados de frio. ¿Pero que esta haciendo Pitufo Torpe con esa extrana roca que ha descubierto? ¿Y por que esta tan entusiasmado Pitufo Minero con su nuevo descubrimiento? Nadie entiende a que se debe tanto revuelo por una simple nueva roca para la coleccion de Pitufo Torpe... Al adentrarse bajo tierra, los Pitufos encontraran peligros y sorpresas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La vida en la Aldea Pitufa podria ser mas tranquila si Puppy se comportara un poco mejor. Sin embargo, el pequeno perro de los Pitufos se dedica a escarbar entre las flores de Pitufina, ensuciar el nuevo papel pintado de Pitufo Vanidoso y arruinar los experimentos de Papa Pitufo. Aun asi, Puppy va a ayudar a los Pitufos a escapar de una trampa que les ha tendido Gargamel. O quiza no tenga la disciplina necesaria para ello...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada vez que Pitufo Perezoso se queda dormido, tiene la misma pesadilla una y otra vez: se encuentra en poder de Morfeo, un malvado hechicero que quiere capturar a tantas almas dormidas como sea posible. Uno tras otro, todos los Pitufos van cayendo en las garras de Morfeo. ¿Todos? Quiza no, si Papa Pitufo puede evitarlo. Para ello, Papa Pitufo acude al Arenero en busca de ayuda...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Selwyn y Tallulah son un matrimonio de poderosos hechiceros. El problema es que estan todo el rato peleandose. La energia de sus discusiones esta formando una temible tormenta, y Papa Pitufo debe conseguir que hagan las paces antes de que la tormenta arrecie.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Por pura casualidad, un elefante que pasaba por el bosque se encuentra con Bebe Pitufo, y los Pitufos deciden crear un gran Circo. Van a visitar al hechicero infernal Baltazar y Bebe Pitufo se lo esta pasando genial...

programme.title: La Venganza De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Se ha desatado una guerra en la Edad Media. Unos caballeros vestidos con armadura destrozan por accidente la Aldea Pitufa, lo que provoca que una pequena banda de Pitufos decida vengar esta afrenta. ¿No pensara Papa Pitufo que esta es una accion demasiado propia de los humanos?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿A donde se han ido todas las ardillas? Pitufo Salvaje esta algo preocupado. Y estaria aun mas preocupado si supiera el malvado plan que ha tramado la horrible bruja Hogata para preparar un tonico capilar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El Pitufo Carpintero se encuentra con una anciana trol en el bosque, que le suplica que le ayude a librarse de un grano rojo que tiene en la nariz... ¡dandole un buen puntapie! Pitufo Carpintero la ayuda sin mucho convencimiento. Y el resultado resulta sorprendente para el.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Lo que mas le gusta a Sasita es recortar munecas de papel. Lo hace con estilo y entusiasmo. Sin embargo, la formula de revitalizacion de Papa Pitufo salpica por accidente las creaciones recortadas por Sasita con consecuencias imprevistas...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el Pitufo Filosofo pierde sus gafas deja caer las cosas, tropieza con los objetos, y se convierte en tan patoso como el Pitufo Tontin, que ahora tiene que leer a Filosofo y ayudarle a manejarse. Esta experiencia hace que Filosofo se sienta culpable por la forma en la que siempre se ha burlado de Tontin. Una vez que recibe un nuevo par de gafas, le trata con mas respeto.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada vez que Pitufo Perezoso se queda dormido, tiene la misma pesadilla una y otra vez: se encuentra en poder de Morfeo, un malvado hechicero que quiere capturar a tantas almas dormidas como sea posible. Uno tras otro, todos los Pitufos van cayendo en las garras de Morfeo. ¿Todos? Quiza no, si Papa Pitufo puede evitarlo. Para ello, Papa Pitufo acude al Arenero en busca de ayuda...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se daran cuenta de que se convertira en una especie de mama pitufo para todos...

programme.title: El Mal Genio
programme.desc: Los Pitufos encuentran un Genio en una lampara que se niega a concederles sus deseos sin la palabra magica.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogapatra, la espantosa, hinchada y vulgar reina del Nilo, no puede dormir y eso hace que le aparezcan grandes ojeras. Su receta para la belleza incluye exprimir a Pitufo Perezoso para extraerle sueno...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Busqueda De La Piedra Magica
programme.desc: En el lejano Valle de Nodrog, los Pitufos se encuentran con El Molians, que quiere conseguir la Pitufo-Piedra que Papa Pitufo necesita para curar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El huevo magico de Gargamel termina en la Aldea de los Pitufos donde los pequenitos azules piden un deseo loco tras otro lo que provoca un caos total. Papa Pitufo tiene que burlar a Gargamel y Giganton antes de que sus pociones magicas deshagan los estragos causados por el huevo y regrese la pitufarmonia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Perdidos en la Tierra de las Arenas Misticas, los Pitufos se encuentran con Ali Baba y su banda de ladrones montados en alfombras magicas, que roban las posesiones mas preciadas de los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel intenta probar un nuevo hechizo en los Pitufos, pero le sale al reves y se convierte a si mismo en piedra. Los Pitufos estan locos de alegria. ¡Su archienemigo ya no les hara sufrir nunca mas!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La vida en la Aldea Pitufa podria ser mas tranquila si Puppy se comportara un poco mejor. Sin embargo, el pequeno perro de los Pitufos se dedica a escarbar entre las flores de Pitufina, ensuciar el nuevo papel pintado de Pitufo Vanidoso y arruinar los experimentos de Papa Pitufo. Aun asi, Puppy va a ayudar a los Pitufos a escapar de una trampa que les ha tendido Gargamel. O quiza no tenga la disciplina necesaria para ello...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Posar para una escultura, sobre todo para una composicion enorme como la de Pitufo Pintor, es un trabajo agotador, y es imposible evitar moverse un poco. Ahora, Papa Pitufo ha encontrado la forma de que los modelos se queden completamente quietos. Sin embargo, tiene algunos inconvenientes, tal como los Pitufos comprobaran pronto...
