programme.desc: In Part 4 of our Super Mario Odyssey 100% Walkthrough, Abdallah shows Nintendo Switch gameplay of the Lake Kingdom, Lake Lamode, while collecting all Moons and Coins!

programme.title: SKWAD
programme.desc: SKWAD brings together the best from gaming culture, along with some straight up weird shows that your kids will love!

programme.title: Nintendo Games with AbdallahSmash026
programme.sub-title: Super Mario Odyssey - Cap Kingdom 100% Walkthrough! Part 1
programme.desc: In Part 1 of our Super Mario Odyssey 100% Walkthrough, Abdallah shows Nintendo Switch gameplay of the Cap Kingdom, Bonneton, while collecting all Moons and Coins!

programme.title: Contemporary Combo Part 1
programme.desc: Build off of Teddy's improvisation techniques and dive into part one of his contemporary choreography. Watch how Teddy's movement dynamics emulate the musical accents, and work on achieving clarity in your shapes.

programme.title: Contemporary Combo Part 3
programme.desc: Take on the final section of Teddy's contemporary combination to finish his entire piece! On top of executing the movement details and dynamics, practice performing all three sections together to challenge your stamina and choreographic retention.

programme.title: Jazz Basics 1
programme.desc: Join Nick in his first Jazz Basics class that focuses on weight shifts and working your feet through the floor. Practice using your plié as you take up space and travel through each exercise sequence.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Leave the ordinary behind and enter the world of make-believe. Create a magical fairy garden with Katie, then Franz shows how to take your paper art work from two to three dimensions. Jenny creates golden coins to swap and trade and then she and Katie make a gift extra special with a stenciled rocket gift bag. Cast a spell with a magic wand or gleaming sword created by adding feathers and jewels to the Family Craft Box.

programme.title: Drawing & Painting
programme.desc: Learn to draw and paint with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Stunning cards, festive decorations and intriguing scrapbook pages await your creativity. Explore the latest tools, techniques and designs to find the inspiration you need to develop your own style and let your personality shine.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Patterns are a design, motif or decoration, formed from regular repeated elements. They can also be naturally-occurring or a random arrangement of shapes, colors which have a regular or decorative effect. Patterns can be stripes, or lines, or alternating colors. The first project has a striped pattern of knots tied with plastic lacing. Next, make felt cookies with a polka dot pattern. Then add a chevron pattern to your art journal. Last, create a folding play mat with landscape patterns of a city scene around a lake.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Today's show is all about texture -- texture is the feel or shape of a surface or thing. It's the smoothness or roughness, or maybe how soft or hard. We will learn about texture with a Paleolithic cave painting, a fun pony corral, and a friendly but prickly hedgehog. Learn how to add texture to your drawings with ordinary things from around the house in the Art Journal segment. Last, make a furry friend with giant chenille stems.

programme.title: Creative Cake Design presented by CraftsyTV
programme.sub-title: Can It Be Cake - Deluxe Cheeseburger Cake Creation!
programme.desc: Is it a cake or is it a burger?

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Look toward the gritty, industrial world for inspiration. Using industrial materials, Joe Rotella creates an artsy tray. Illustrator Jenn Mason designs contemporary earrings, then hardens them with heat. Joe Rotella revs up his micro lathe to carve a keepsake pen. Finally, take a road trip to the Columbus Idea Foundry, a center for the growing Maker Movement.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Today, art becomes fashion. Mixed media artist Rae Missigman makes a wearable art journal for her artful ideas. Today's hottest jewelry trend is crafted into a bangle bracelet by Jen Cushman. Artist Candie Cooper affirms her art statement by embellishing boots. Jane Dunnewold has another idea about the maker's movement.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Use shapes in new ways. Modern Quilt Guild marketing director Heather Grant discusses the modern quilt aesthetic and modern quilt designs. Blogger Rossie Hutchinson joins quilter Elizabeth Dackson to talk about improv quilt events. Instructor Rebecca Kemp Brent uses the latest cutting and quilting technology to create a confetti star quilt design.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: She's Baaaaaack! Been itchin' for wine + stitchin'? Angela's kicking off a brand new season with a rather "puzzling" episode.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.sub-title: Bonus: 5 Items Around Your House to Use for Quilting
programme.desc: From cornstarch to cuticle pushers, Angela shares five ingenious hacks for using common household items for quilting.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.sub-title: Bonus: Tips for Avoiding Bulky Seams
programme.desc: Sometimes bulky seams can't be avoided, but DON'T panic! Angela has a few tips for how to deal with this quilting conundrum.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.sub-title: The World at War, Again - The 1940's
programme.desc: Factories hummed and women took up men's roles making military supplies as the second World War began. Fabric was rationed and women took fashion cues from military uniforms. Angela Wolf makes a contemporary jacket inspired by General Eisenhower's shortened uniform jacket. Embroidery expert Lisa Shaw shows how to design a handy embroidered clutch bag for an evening out.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Be ready to go -- anywhere, anytime. Sewing blogger and busy Mom Caroline Critchfield stays packed and ready with a handy bag made with clear vinyl and colorful fabric. Award-winning quilter Carolina Moore takes along paper-piecing projects so she can keep stitching wherever she goes. Alex Woodbury shares a charity sewing project.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Give your leather designs a real workout. Jewelry designer Katie Hacker warms up by creating a choker necklace with beads and leather cord. Jewelry-maker Jill MacKay cuts leather shapes and adds stamps, paint and beads. Then, she cools down by adding metallic effects to leather motifs.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: In this episode we investigate peaceful pursuits – when the actual making along with the finished product give us a sense of peace and a calm. Kim O'Neill demonstrates a piece entitled "breathe deep for calming" and adding scents to a lava rock bracelet. Then meet Jill Wiseman for bead weaving - the back and forth repetition can give that sense of peace. Finally, Kate Richbourg creates bead lariats in intricate patterns but simply constructed.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Flowers fill this episode. First Julie embellishes tags with a floral watercolor design to use on a page layout. Then Julie interviews May Flaum. Next, Kathy Cano-Murillo uses more flowers with her signature glitter style to add to her scrapbook page. Last, Julie cuts and pieces flower designs to use as card embellishments.

programme.title: 7 Days S1 - "Day 5"
programme.desc: In the Chinese desert, Kevin finds out that desert racing is difficult. While in Bolivia, Jalou wants to prove to her brother that women can be better drivers.

programme.title: 7 Days S1 - "Day 6 "
programme.desc: After exploring Peru, Jalou has to get over her fear when she goes white water kayaking. In Thailand, Kevin is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: THRU S1 - "The Basement"
programme.desc: After the emotional exits of Frank and Tung Tung, the competition continues with an Olympic touch. Will team red earn money for their jackpot this time?

programme.title: THRU S1 - "The Swamp"
programme.desc: Trusting Vitor was difficult, so the red team sent him away. Blue team fights back, without soldier Keith. No closed doors this time but mud, insect and reed.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Zagreb"
programme.desc: Epic Exploring: Going Local visits Zagreb, Croatia. Cody fires a canon from the old tower, explores a never finished University Hospital and a political school.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Barentsburg"
programme.desc: Local Exploring on the edge of the world as Josh is on the artic Svalbard archipelago to explore in and around Barentsburg and the Arctic Ocean.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Tirana"
programme.desc: From Tirana, capital of old Soviet satellite Albania, Josh starts another local adventure filled with bunkers, a hidden hospital and diving in a pirate’s cave.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Lüderitz"
programme.desc: Epic Exploring is going local again as Cody adventures in Lüderitz, Namibia going off the beaten path, through the desert and on to the ghost town of Pamona.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "White Water"
programme.desc: The adrenaline has worn off for Chris and Casey, and the jet lag has set in. The brothers face frigid temperatures and unpredictable whitewater rapids. When they try to navigate the rough waterways, their safety is threatened.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Risk and Reward"
programme.desc: The Keefer Brothers make an important decision that vastly impacts their expedition. In a desperate search of necessary food, they attempt to hunt big game for the first time in New Zealand, and encounter a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Driving the Bus"
programme.desc: Chris and Casey are introduced to the tastes of the New Zealand wild, and get a rude awakening. Mother Nature’s mind games start to mess with the brothers’ mental strength, while their inflatable raft continues to be a serious problem.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Round Two"
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Chris and Casey disagree on what their next course of action should be. Without clear cache directions, the brothers are left with a hard choice. Should they stay, or should they go?

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Peaks and Valleys"
programme.desc: Chris and Casey hike the mountainside, but the steep slopes and shifting shale make the trek anything but easy. The brothers face energy depletion and exhaustion, and they feel the pressure to find new food sources soon, or go hungry.

programme.desc: Supercar Blondie arrives in ‘Motor City’ in the dead of winter but given access to a half million dollar new Ford GT raises her spirits. Her goal is to learn more about muscle cars, born in Detroit, and her journey takes her in different directions.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "New York"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie hits New York City in a four million dollar rare Lamborghini Centenario. Her quest is to track down the players in the underground drift driving scene and visit the exclusive Manhattan Motor Club.

programme.desc: James Woods is the rockstar of the free skiing world. He is defiant, a renegade, unafraid to push boundaries and winning is nothing short of a drug to him.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Jonesing for a Road Runner"
programme.desc: When high profile local car dealer Don Jones Jr. wants to bring back the car of his youth, where does he go? Anywhere he wants! But when your high school dream car is a 1969 Road Runner, your dream shop is Graveyard Carz.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Memento Mori"
programme.desc: Graveyard Carz has restored its fair share of 1971 ‘Cudas, so what makes this 1971 Hemi Shaker ‘Cuda so different? Don’t worry, we won’t ruin the surprise. This is the first time in Graveyard Carz broadcasts, that the car will be revealed backwards!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Another Dreamz Machine"
programme.desc: Mark and Justin begin assembly on the ultra rare 1971 Mr. Norm's Dodge Demon. Then the team shifts gears to focus on a Graveyard Dreamz, 1969 Charger tribute car that's made to order.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Flight of the Super Bee"
programme.desc: Mark and the Ghouls race to finish a one owner 1970 Super Bee that belongs to a decorated retired Marine. But as Mark and Justin forge ahead on this one owner car, a SNAFU on Will's side of the shop may cause a total mission failure.

programme.title: Lights Camera Action - T-Pain - Behind The Scenes - Church
DL Hughley Uncut - Guest Willy T Ribbs
programme.desc: Guest on DL Uncut is former race car driver Willy T. Ribbs. Willy was the first African American to test a Formula One racing car and first African American to compete in the Indy 500. DL, Jasmine and Willy discuss the sport of auto racing, the lack of diversity, and the future of sport in the changing times of America.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 2
programme.desc: You have an intimate relationship with everything you put in your mouth. The tongue is a magical instrument for you to start to remember the power of flavor and nutrients, to slow it down and experience food again.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 3
programme.desc: The esophagus is simply a tube that runs from mouth to stomach, moving food from one to the other. And yet, as we dig into its structure, we find an extraordinarily complicated and intricate organ that has a deep relationship to the beauty of the body. The reality of this simple tube ends up displaying the sheer miracle of a day in the life of a human being.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 4
programme.desc: In terms of its surface area and musculature, the stomach is designed to listen to your food. What is your stomach listening to? It�s listening to how your food was grown, lived, and died. It�s picking up on the microRNA that was in your food right at the moment you consumed it.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation
programme.desc: Cultivate a judgment free attitude as you explore the inner world of your thoughts and feelings.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation
programme.sub-title: Meditations for Manifestation - Love Your Body
programme.desc: Come back into alignment through awareness of the body.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 6 practice invites you to use core work to get clear. In this session we use controlled movement to activate the muscles of the abdominal for a strong and healthy back and strengthen your whole self.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation
programme.desc: Start your meditation practice with a few moments of mindful awareness built around the movement of the breath and the sensations of the body.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 4 practice provides you the opportunity to lean in when you feel discomfort to embrace the process of finding ease. Discover layers of your home practice as we look at our patterns and continue to build a dynamic vocabulary that serves.

programme.title: Deep Relaxation with Tracee Stanley
programme.desc: Move beyond the mind and connect with a deeper part of yourself. Experiment and let go and explore your true nature to create a new way of being in the world.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut
programme.sub-title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 5
programme.desc: The geometry of the pancreas is exquisite. The real work of nutrient availability begins with the elegant coordination of liver, gallbladder, pancreas, and small intestines.

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: Union with Yourself
programme.desc: The essential nature of the physical world is that it's not physical. The essential nature of the material world is that it's not material. As Rumi says, “We come spinning out of nothingness scattering stars like dust.”

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.sub-title: How to Transcend Fear into Love
programme.desc: We live in a fear-based world. In today’s lesson, Anita offers you tools that have been specially created to overcome your fears with love. This is the greatest lesson she learned during her near-death experience when she traveled to the other side. It’s the lesson that saved her life.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.sub-title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
programme.desc: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: If you want to step into healing conversations, you have to have a clear understanding of where you’re going, and it starts within: the first healing conversation you need to have is with yourself.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: What does it mean to experience symptoms of imbalance? In this segment we review what’s happening in your body and how you can use food to bring it back to balance. We start with vata.

programme.title: Abundant Joy with Scott Schwenk
programme.sub-title: Abundant Joy - Day 3 Solar Plexus Chakra
programme.desc: Today, we look at Manipura, located near the navel or solar plexus, which is about how we use or are affected by power and will. As this region becomes empowered, as it releases its contractions, it moves up into the heart center and empowers the ability to give and receive love freely.

programme.title: Abundant Joy with Scott Schwenk
programme.desc: This toolbox episode will teach you how to listen, sit for meditation, set your manifestations, and find your mantra.

programme.title: Balance Your Hormones with Dr. Jolene Brighten
programme.desc: Did you know that 80,000 toxic chemicals have been released into the environment since the Industrial Revolution? What's worse is that very few have been tested for their long-term impact on human health. Today's session is all about detoxification, the natural process that our liver, kidneys, lungs, lymphatic system, gut, and skin perform daily to get rid of metabolic byproducts that our body produces and toxins that are absorbed from the environment. You'll learn how to avoid toxins and how to address those that you already are carrying due to the nature of the environment, as well as how to optimize your body's ability to detoxify.

programme.title: Good Mood Food with Jason Wrobel
programme.desc: It’s time to unleash your inner MasterChef today! Jason discusses his mindset and ethos around making a meal, including principles for balancing flavors, textures, mouthfeel.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: Ayurveda relies upon the intelligence of the cosmos–if you want to understand how the universe works, you must tune in to your own cycles. In this course, you’ll learn how to use the principles of Ayurveda to bring the focus back to you so you can make more intuitive and informed health decisions.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: The universe and everything in it was created with five elements: earth, water, fire, wind, and ether. For the creation of the planet, five elements came together in different proportions, and since we are made of the five elements, it takes these five elements to feed and nourish us. Once we understand our composition, and how these elements work in our body, we can start to understand what we need to replenish ourselves.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: The basic rules of food consumption come from one of Nidhi’s favorite Ayurvedic texts: the Charak Samhita. Charak is considered the father of Ayurveda, and the text is at least 1,000 years old. In it we find simple and applicable rules that you can bring to your life today.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: A lot of people come to Ayurveda from Yoga and assume that it is purely a plant-based science. We want to bring you back to the perspective that Yoga is the science of energy, and Ayurveda is the science of matter. Ayurveda utilizes meats for the preservation of life; and in this segment, we address the quality and order of meats.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: In today's segment, we talk about food combinations that create imbalance due to the nature of the two unique foods. It’s important to understand what food combinations lead to undigested material, called ama, in your system, so you make more informed decisions that support your digestive health.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: Why is it important for you to consider your kitchen to be a sacred place? In our modern time, our relationship with the kitchen is either non-existent or damaged, so almost everyone feels daunted when they think about Ayurvedic cooking. In this segment, you will discover how to change that relationship and start to view your kitchen, and the time you spend in it, as sacred.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: We are no longer the farm-to-table species. Processed food, meal prep, and stale foods are some of our biggest blocks to Ayurvedic living. Today, let’s look at how we can begin to view food differently and keep Ayurvedic principles alive.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: What is the Ayurvedic understanding of the mind-gut connection? In this segment, we cover the way our body works in harmony with the world around us.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: What does it mean to experience symptoms of imbalance? In this segment we review what’s happening in your body and how you can use food to bring it back to balance. We start with vata.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: Menopause is the time in a woman's life when she stops menstruating, when her ovaries have released all possible eggs, and she enters a new era. In the last twenty to thirty years we've seen changes in the body and mood associated with menopause. This lesson covers how our lifestyle and food affect our experience of menopause.

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: If you want to step into healing conversations, you have to have a clear understanding of where you’re going, and it starts within: the first healing conversation you need to have is with yourself.

programme.title: Healing Conversations
programme.desc: This session is an insight session that is designed to follow the previous lesson (so go back if you haven’t watched it yet). You’ll integrate everything you’ve learned so far and set yourself up for taking practical action in your life. By doing this work, you’ll step more fully into your vision for your life and your vision for the world.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: Ayurveda relies upon the intelligence of the cosmos–if you want to understand how the universe works, you must tune in to your own cycles. In this course, you’ll learn how to use the principles of Ayurveda to bring the focus back to you so you can make more intuitive and informed health decisions.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: The universe and everything in it was created with five elements: earth, water, fire, wind, and ether. For the creation of the planet, five elements came together in different proportions, and since we are made of the five elements, it takes these five elements to feed and nourish us. Once we understand our composition, and how these elements work in our body, we can start to understand what we need to replenish ourselves.

programme.desc: The basic rules of food consumption come from one of Nidhi’s favorite Ayurvedic texts: the Charak Samhita. Charak is considered the father of Ayurveda, and the text is at least 1,000 years old. In it we find simple and applicable rules that you can bring to your life today.

programme.desc: A lot of people come to Ayurveda from Yoga and assume that it is purely a plant-based science. We want to bring you back to the perspective that Yoga is the science of energy, and Ayurveda is the science of matter. Ayurveda utilizes meats for the preservation of life; and in this segment, we address the quality and order of meats.

programme.title: Ayurvedic Nutrition
programme.desc: In today's segment, we talk about food combinations that create imbalance due to the nature of the two unique foods. It’s important to understand what food combinations lead to undigested material, called ama, in your system, so you make more informed decisions that support your digestive health.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this second stage of the World championship of lightweights we will find out who out of the 12 athletes will win the title in the under 105 kilogram category.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power
programme.desc: The second stage of 2014 Strongman champions League, in Cologne, Germany. 14 athletes from 12 different countries battled through six events on the second stop

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The third episode is hosted in Serbia where world records are broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next stage of the SCL takes place in Holland with events such as the Atlas Stones and Truck Pull being witnessed

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fourth episode takes place in Finland with events such as Bus Pull and the forward hold

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Episode 8 takes place in 36 degree heat in Croatia and sees the return of Krzysztof Radzikowski after a 2 month absence due to injury

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title

Heavy Water
programme.desc: Heavy Water is a Michael Oblowitz film, produced by Red Bull Media House and All Edge Entertainment, that follows the life and times of Nathan Fletcher, part of the royal family of surfing and a key figure in big wave history.

programme.title: Discovering Mavericks
programme.desc: This is the story of those who risked their lives, some paying the ultimate price, for the ultimate ride. Executive produced by Mavericks legend Jeff Clark and directed by Joshua Pomer. Winner of the Newport Beach Film Festival 2013 Audience Award.

programme.title: Tokyo Rising
programme.desc: John John Florence puts his career on the line against Kelly Slater to qualify for surfings debut in the 2020 Olympics.

programme.title: The Electric Acid Surfboard Test: Noa Deane
programme.desc: A Hawaiian exploration of alternative surfboard design: The Electric Acid Surfboard Test, Starring Noa Deane. Filmed on location at the Volcom House on the North Shore of Oahu.

programme.title: And Two If By Sea
programme.desc: The story of iconic professional surfers and identical twins CJ & Damien Hobgood. Their sibling rivalry and struggle to each establish their own identity fueled their careers, but ripped their personal and peripheral relationships apart.

programme.title: The Longest Wave
programme.desc: THE LONGEST WAVE offers a rare glimpse into what motivates an athlete who has everything to lose to push his body and mind to the limit. A film about surf legend Robby Naish.

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Mikey February, Torren Martyn, Noa Deane, Mason Ho

programme.title: American Roundtable
programme.desc: We had a lot of questions about American surfing. Why has the number of Americans on Tour declined? Are American kids any less motivated than kids from other parts of the world? Is there anything wrong with the American amateur system? Should surfers from Hawaii surf for America? Are we less patriotic than other nations? We could’ve tried to answer these questions ourselves. We could’ve drank coffee and punched keys from the confines of our office. We could’ve driven up and down the forevers of the country’s coastal roads, finding refuge and realization at any of the peaks wedging within her precious coves. We could’ve spent late nights drinking wine or whiskey or just plain water and arrived at some sort of a conclusion. That would’ve been the easy way. Instead, we got on the phone.

programme.title: 7 Miles of Paradise
programme.desc: The North Shore is a 7 Mile stretch of paradise like no other on Earth. Every year thousands of people flock to the North Shore of Oahu to see the world's best surfers ride arguably the world's best waves. Pro surfers have created their careers, made their livings and even become legends from surfing these shores. Pro surfer Anastasia Ashley will be your tour guide and take you to the places she loves, the places she went as a kid growing up there, and introduce you to the people that always made it feel like home. We will experience and understand why she loves the North Shore, and considers it '7 Miles of Paradise'

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Tanner Gudauskas, Brendon Gibbens

programme.title: REDirect
programme.desc: Eleven short surf films shot on state-of-the-art RED cameras, Featuring Chris Bryan, Matt Shuster, Riley Blakeway, Jensen Young Sik, Ryan Perry

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Dane Gudauskas, Mikey February, Mikey Wright

programme.title: El Ninos Wake
programme.desc: Surfer presents a new surf flim, El Niños Wake. Echoes from a historic west coast winter.

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Mason Ho, Oliver Kurtz, Noa Deane, Creed McTaggart

programme.title: Stranger Surfing
programme.desc: Stranger Surfing opens with a huge air flip by Gabriel Medina and the action just gets hotter and hotter. John John launches and pulls a 6 foot rotation air.

programme.title: Heavy Water
programme.desc: Heavy Water is a Michael Oblowitz film, produced by Red Bull Media House and All Edge Entertainment, that follows the life and times of Nathan Fletcher, part of the royal family of surfing and a key figure in big wave history.

programme.title: Relentless: The Inspiring Story of Dusty Payne's Return To Surfing
programme.desc: Dusty Payne has been through it all, from nailing closing sections in the most progressive surf films of his generation and competing at the highest levels on the World Tour, to laying in a hospital bed with metal plates in his head and a jaw wired shut after a horrific wipeout at Backdoor. But even at his lowest points, Payne's passion for surfing has always been the fuel to get him through the darkest hours and back into the light. In "Relentless," we followed Payne before his near-fatal wipeout as he competed and freesurfed his way through Portugal and scored all-time sessions with friends back home in Hawaii. We also captured the wave that nearly spelled the end for Payne and the months-long battle he fought to return to the water. What we learned was something that those closest to Payne already knew, which was that no matter how dire the situation, you can never count Payne out. This is his story. This is "Relentless."

programme.title: Forbidden Trim
programme.desc: A Marine is sent on a secret mission to Central America. He is seeking intel on a commando syndicate hiding out in the forbidden jungle. He encounters wild animals, a mystical guru, and a group of surfers who help complete is objectives.

programme.title: Trouble: The Lisa Andersen Story
programme.desc: Lisa Andersen is one of surfings few transcendent stars. 4x world champ and inductee into the Surfer Hall of Fame, she is a true surf icon. But this is not a story about surfing. Its the story of a woman brave enough to be vulnerable.

programme.title: Girl on Wave
programme.desc: Girl on Wave follows windsurfer Sarah Hauser and documents her journey as a New-Caledonian athlete competing on the American stage of windsurfing. Performing in competitions around the globe, Sarah is leaving a unique mark on the sport.

programme.title: Surf Shop Chronicles: Episodes 1
programme.desc: There's always been something special about surf shops. From the amalgamated scent of wax, new wetsuits and fresh boards to the intel on which local break is currently working best, where to get the best post-surf burrito in town and so much more, surf culture resides inside surf shops-that's what makes them special. In our web series Shop Chronicles, SURFER shares the stories of the most iconic surf shops around.

programme.title: REDirect
programme.desc: Eleven short surf films shot on state-of-the-art RED cameras, Featuring Bryce Lowe-White, Eric Knutson, Jason Baffa

programme.title: FULL SPEED
programme.desc: FULL SPEED will get any surfer amped to go surfing! Witness the hottest surfing on the planet. Sure to raise any surfer's heartbeat and peak their STOKE levels!

programme.title: Dirty Old Wedge
programme.desc: Dirty Old Wedge is the real life story of the world's most infamous shorebreak and those who live it

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Craig Anderson, Mason Ho, Sterling Spencer

programme.title: Higher Light
programme.desc: Beyrick De Vries and Friends Tour Africa in "Higher Light"

programme.title: Fast and Loose
programme.desc: The day has finally come, dear reader, where we can show you our twin-fin-filled creation, "Fast & Loose". The film tells the story of the modern performance twin through the lens of Australian icon Mark Richards, who found inspiration in the boards of Reno Abellira, shaping tutelage in Dick Brewer and created a design all his own that he surfed to four straight world titles. To this day, Richard's feat of making his own boards and surfing them to such success stands apart as one of the greatest achievements of all time surfing. But what's perhaps more impressive is the way that twin-fin designs have evolved in the aftermath, disappearing for years before reemerging in modern surf culture as the go-to craft for those looking to balance performance surfing with high-speed, skatey fun. "Fast & Loose" celebrates that unique flavor not just through the story of MR, but through modern rippers like Zeke Lau and Kael Walsh, who took the classic twins and updated versions for a spin. It was a fun film to make, as it damn well should be when the subject is twin fins. Hopefully the feeling is contagious. Please enjoy.

programme.title: Quivers
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine MTV’s Cribs and Professional Surfers? Quivers, an in-depth look at the boards of today's top surfers. Featuring Dane Gudauskas, Mikey February, Mikey Wright

programme.title: Best of Bobshirt: A Skateboarding Documentary
programme.desc: The best of Bobshirt's interview footage from this past year is compiled in this nostalgic documentary.

programme.title: Depth Perception
programme.desc: Depth Perception showcases the layers of the super natural world, the perfect backdrop for some of the most empowered free-riding of their lives. Follow Travis Rice and friends as they embark to the best places to on earth to snowboard.

programme.title: In Motion
programme.desc: Olympic bronze medalist and ten-time X Games medalist Mark McMorris wants the world to know theres more to snowboarding than tricks and trophies. Traveling the world and riding with the sports best, he explores snowboard culture.

programme.title: FRUITION - The Life and Dreams of Nicolas Muller
programme.desc: We live in a world which demands us to obey things we might not believe in. But with intuition as his guide, Nicolas Muller has tackled life's obstacles in order to find a true path as one of the most influential snowboarders of all time.

programme.title: Roadless
programme.desc: Pro snowboarders Bryan Iguchi, Jeremy Jones and Travis Rice have shaped their careers around exploring the frontiers of the sport. Follow them into the largest wilderness of the lower 48 in the latest Teton Gravity Research snowboard film.

programme.title: FunDuhMentals: Transworld Snowboarding 20 Tricks
programme.desc: This three-part series covers board setup, what to know before you drop, and the top 12 basic tricks that will help progress your riding.

programme.title: Tangle
programme.desc: When a common thread is woven with the ties that bind us a TANGLE ensues. Featuring DESIREE MELANCON, JILL PERKINS, NIRVANA ORTANEZ, PHIL HANSEN, BODE MERRILL, JEFF HOLCE, DENVER ORR, AND DYLAN OKUROWSKI. Presented by SNOWBOARDER Magazine.

programme.title: Range of Mystery
programme.desc: Range of Mystery is the odyssey of three passionate snowboarders chasing a rumor. Given only an old photograph of a peak, they are determined to find the location of a fabled high altitude utopia.

programme.title: Tanner Hall Forever
programme.desc: At age 35, professional skier and seven-time X-Games champion Tanner Hall struggles to stay at the top of his sport, overcoming injuries and addiction to compete for his first time on the Freeride World Tour.

programme.title: The Snowboarder Movie: SFD
programme.desc: SFD is not just a saying. Its a movement. An ideology. An approach. A choice made deliberately to dedicate ones life to snowboardings counter-culture philosophy.

programme.title: Dark Matter
programme.desc: World-renowned snowboarders Travis Rice and Elias Elhardt team up with legendary director Curt Morgan for a celebration of space and time filmed in the deep backcountry of Alaska.

programme.title: Arcadia - TransWorld SNOWboarding
programme.desc: With a cast comprised of some of the most talented, stylish, and inventive snowboarders in existence, TransWorlds seventh feature film, Arcadia, delivers top-tier action from snowy locations the world over.

programme.title: Making Your Mark: The Snowboard Life of Mark McMorris
programme.desc: Making Your Mark: The Snowboard Life of Mark McMorris brings you a blueprint for making it big in snowboarding and in life

programme.title: JOY
programme.desc: From the slopes of North Island Japan to the Heart of Interior B.C., this is the journey of Olympians Red Gerard, Sage Kotsenburg, & Ben Ferguson as they travel the world in search of the best powder and mountains for snowboarding.

programme.title: All in a Dream: A Film by Danny Davis
programme.desc: Danny Davis thinks he has seen it all; from contest podiums on the world stage, to backcountry mountains in both Hemispheres. But when a crash sends his season plans off course, he is forced to face his biggest challenge to date, himself.

programme.title: The Snowboarder Movie: Foreword
programme.desc: SNOWBOARDER Magazinethe worldwide leader in snowboard lifestyle, culture and newshand-picked ten of the most promising young snowboarding talents and brought them around the globe to show the world what the future of the sport looks like.

programme.title: CreedleCosm
programme.desc: CreedleCosm is a chrysalis of endless snowboarding possibilities starring the communal magic of Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picard, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero & Jamie Lynn.

programme.title: Supervention 2
programme.desc: From the young and ambitious to the legends of back then, meet the athletes who choose to risk it all. Supervention 2 takes you through all walks of life to experience what its like to leave behind normality for the thrill of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Snowboarder Movie: Resolution
programme.desc: RESOLUTION is a snowboard film for fans of all riding genres, from jibs to jumps and gigantic freeriding lines and it features the most insane roster of riders to appear in a single film in over a decade.

programme.title: Wildcats Never Die
programme.desc: The Wildcats are back and better than ever with their first film in a decade. This installment of the OG Wildcats crew showcases their present day skills on and off the hill and in famed snowboarding locales: B.C., Japan, and Chile.

programme.title: The Snowboarder Movie: Everybody, Everybody
programme.desc: Everybody, Everybody invites viewers into a season-long cinematic session as twelve riders, an eclectic cross section of snowboardings hell-bent vanguard, partake in the quixotic quest for the perfect video part.

programme.title: The Snowboarder Movie: Beta
programme.desc: With Beta, SNOWBOARDER has assembled an eclectic crew of disrupters who are striving to change the game. Volatile and charming, this cadre of riders spent 2018 sending it further, stomping cleaner and pushing progression harder than ever.

programme.title: Shredtopia
programme.desc: SHREDTOPIA is the new movie coming out from the Shredbots this year. The crew keeps building, with new additions continuing to build on the idea that anyone can be a Shredbot.

programme.title: Shredtopia
programme.desc: SHREDTOPIA is the new movie coming out from the Shredbots this year. The crew keeps building, with new additions continuing to build on the idea that anyone can be a Shredbot.

programme.title: Winter Dew Tour
programme.sub-title: 2018 : Women's Snowboard Solo & Team Challenge Finals
programme.desc: Dew Tour 2018 Women’s Snowboard Finals + Snowboard Team Challenge Finals from Breckenridge, CO.

programme.title: Yeah Right!
programme.desc: Invisible skateboards, Eric Koston, super duper slo mo, Brandon Biebel, Marc Johnson, Owen Wilson, Rick McCrank, The Skatetrix, Gino Iannucci, Mike Carroll, The Magic Board, Brian Anderson, and the entire Girl and Chocolate Skateboard teams.

programme.title: Boroughs to the Bay
programme.desc: JZ takes us through the entire tour day by day, session after session from NYC to the Bay. Get an inside feel of the spots skated, security trying to stop the flow and overall the fun taking place skating with your friends. Later, the crew warms up in Battery Park and hits spots along Water Street. After the Wall Street switch frontside flip from Juan Pablo, the squad picks up Bonestalone for an evening midtown sesh with a stop at Brick 9.

programme.title: Boroughs to the Bay
programme.desc: In Episode 2 Bonestalone takes advantage of a rainy day and front 180s the subway tracks in Harlem before stacking Big Cans and clips inside the AriZona factory.

programme.title: Boroughs to the Bay
programme.desc: In episode 3 the squad hops on a flight to SF and handles NBDs at Yerba Buena Gardens and Union Square.

programme.title: Cee Lo Y Sangria Tour
programme.desc: Episode 1 features the AriZona posse packing the dice and jumping on a flight to Barcelona and Madrid for eight days of skating. Bonestalone, Juan Pablo Velez, Carlo Carezzano, JJ Colõn, Leo Heinert and Eugenia Ginepro hit the streets immediately upon arrival and finished the evening off hangin’ at MACBA and Nurse Betty’s. Then the squad barged the famous Dylan Rieder transitions at Barcelona’s Forum on the first full day of the trip. Big ups to Gnarmads’ Matt Kruz for scooping up the moped to make the sesh go off!

programme.title: Cee Lo Y Sangria Tour
programme.desc: In this episode, Leo Heinert and Carlo Carezzano knock out a couple bangers before the crew jumped on the high speed train to Madrid. Then, The first day in Madrid was magical. The squad diced up footy all day at Plaza de Santo Domingo, Congreso ledges and Plaza de Colõn. A quick train ride and an epic sesh in Alcorcón for the final day of the Cee-Lo y Sangria Tour. Just when we thought it was over, Leo Heinert dug deeper and dropped a NBD into the hubba at Plaza De Santo Domingo.

programme.title: Cee Lo Y Sangria Tour
programme.desc: The AriZona posse packed the dice and jumped on a flight to Barcelona and Madrid for eight days of radness.

programme.title: Ghost Money Pho Life Tour
programme.desc: Block 1: A compilation of Transworld Skateboarding's Ghost Money Pho Life Tour!

programme.title: Ghost Money Pho Life Tour
programme.desc: Block 2: A compilation of Transworld Skateboarding's Ghost Money Pho Life Tour!

programme.title: Ghost Money Pho Life Tour
programme.desc: Block 3: A compilation of Transworld Skateboarding's Ghost Money Pho Life Tour!

programme.title: Slice N Dice Tour
programme.desc: The AriZona Squad jumped in the van for a week of slicin’ and dicin’ in New York City all the way to Albany. Bonestalone, Carlo Carezzano, Leo Heinert, JJ Colõn and Simon Vasquez session Maria Hernandez, ConEd Banks, JFK, Rockaway Beach and Coney Island in the first episode.

programme.title: Slice N Dice Tour
programme.desc: The AriZona squad spent six days slicin’ and dicin’ throughout The Big Apple all the way to Albany. - Bonestalone, Carlo Carezzano, Leo Heinert, JJ Colõn, and Simon Vasquez knocked out NBDs at Coney Island, JFK, Con Ed banks, Maria Hernandez and 60 West.

programme.title: Riddles in Mathematics
programme.desc: Chris Thiessen leads his handpicked crew of skaters on another worldwide tour of unhindered expression. Starring Yaje Popson, Ben Gore, Leo Valls, Bobby Dekeyzer, and featuring Bobby Worrest and Stevie Perez.

programme.title: Motivation 2: The Chris Cole Story
programme.desc: Motivation 2: The Chris Cole Story is a story that will inspire you to live your dreams, even when the world seems stacked against you.

programme.title: Transworld Skateboarding: Hallelujah
programme.desc: Hallelujah features top skaters from different teams and mashes their unique styles into one video thats not to be missed.

programme.title: The Creature Video
programme.desc: The Creature Horde is back for the next chapter of blood letting and mental torture. Witness the horror as the crew decimates spots all around the globe.

programme.title: We Are Blood
programme.desc: We Are Blood is a modern day skate epic featuring Paul Rodriguez and top skateboarders as they travel the globe pushing the limits of whats possible on a skateboard while celebrating the unconditional bond created by the simple act of skateboarding.

programme.title: Duets: A Transworld Skateboarding Production
programme.desc: With over two decades of skate videos in the bag, Transworld Skateboarding proudly presents video Number 30, Duets. Shot on RED in 4K across the globe, Duets brings Transworlds video franchise full-circle.

programme.title: The Flat Earth
programme.desc: Another super polished, overly produced debacleTy Evanss new film, The Flat Earth, delivers the gnarliest skateboarding from this years new breed of rippers: Jamie Foy, Chase Webb, Carlos Iqui, Michael Pulizzi and Cody Lockwood.

programme.title: Right to Exist: Santa Cruz Skateboards
programme.desc: Santa Cruz Skateboards is proud to present Right To Exist. The first full length Santa Cruz Skateboards video since 2005. Filmed over the span of a year and a half and featuring the entire Santa Cruz team.

programme.title: Concrete Kids
programme.desc: Two nine-year-old boys from Venice CA set off on a mission to cross Los Angeles on skateboards at night in an attempt to reach the Staples Center by 8am the next morning for a survival contest.

programme.title: Wet Dream: A Skateboard Tale
programme.desc: Presented by GIRL FILMS and Executive Producer SPIKE JONZE, WET DREAM is a groundbreaking film from director FEDERICO MARZIO VITETTA.

programme.title: Behind the Story: We Are Skateboarders
programme.desc: Behind every picture is a thousand words, and behind every film there is a filmmaker who usually has to bleed unbridled passion to get the film from point A to point B.

programme.title: We Are Skateboarders
programme.desc: We Are Skateboarders is a 'as real as it gets' documentation of the soul of skateboarding, and how some of the legendary skateboarders feel its soul has changed over the years.

programme.title: Jart Skateboards: The Am Project
programme.desc: The European skateboard brand JART Skateboards, presents its new video focusen on the AM team.

programme.title: 1947: The Lrg Video
programme.desc: 1947 is our second full-length skate video, named in honor of Jonas and his family, and in recognition of the unity and being part of something greater. From the skateboarders to the people behind the scenes, LRG remains a family operation.

programme.title: Yeah Right!
programme.desc: Invisible skateboards, Eric Koston, super duper slo mo, Brandon Biebel, Marc Johnson, Owen Wilson, Rick McCrank, The Skatetrix, Gino Iannucci, Mike Carroll, The Magic Board, Brian Anderson, and the entire Girl and Chocolate Skateboard teams.

programme.title: Skateboarding Explained: The Instructional
programme.desc: In this critically acclaimed video, Top Lake Owen instructor, and Mentality Pro, Dan MacFarlane takes you through his Proven system and breaks the tricks down in the same way that has helped his students learn.

programme.title: Fleeting Time
programme.desc: Fleeting Time is an action-packed snowboard movie for our times, featuring snowboarder Ben Ferguson along with an all-star crew of riders in a two-year quest to capture the best freeriding action in the best conditions.

programme.title: Shaun Palmer: The Miserable Champion
programme.desc: The Miserable Champion is a shocking portrait of one of the most notorious athletes of all-time, action sports hero Shaun Palmer. This tell-all movie reveals Shaun from birth to the near fatal overdose to his comeback to make the 2006 Olympic Team.

programme.title: Kamikazu: A TransWorld SNOWboarding Production
programme.desc: Starring modern snowboarding icon Kazu Kokubo, Kamikazu documents some of the best backcountry riding in history, in deep mountain locations around the globe, from snowboarders hand-selected by Kazu based on style and originality.

programme.title: For Lack of Better
programme.desc: These "street skiers" dedicate their lives to traveling from city to city pushing the limits of what is possible on skis in urban environments. Filmmaker Clayton Vila takes you behind the scenes into a winter with these unique professional skiers.

programme.title: This Is Home
programme.desc: From Europe to the US and back again via old playgrounds, new challenges, secret spots and favourite lines THIS IS HOME chronicles what it means to be a freeskier today.

programme.title: The Unrideables: Alaska Range
programme.desc: In The Unrideables: Alaska Range, the worlds foremost expert on human flight, Jon Devore, sets out with a team of elite aerial athletes to evolve the sport of Speedriding.

programme.title: The Man Boys
programme.desc: Amongst the worlds most striking mountainscapes, and upon the mean streets of the urban frontcountry, this band of pals, The Manboys, perform risky snowboarding maneuvers off features theyve built by hand, with love and sometimes shovels.

programme.title: Zig Zag
programme.desc: Level 1 brings out the heaviest cast and crew yet for our 19th feature film, documenting a lifestyle of contradiction: Untracked and well-travelled. Love and money. Natural and synthetic. Powder and slush. Consistent but never predictable.

programme.title: Guest List
programme.desc: Tom Wallisch and the Good Company crew return with their second full-length film, Guest List, featuring world class urban, park and backcountry skiing, all with their trademark fun style. The Guest List for this party is stacked.

programme.title: Sierra Quitiquit: How Did I Get Here
programme.desc: How Did I Get Here is a coming-of-age story, full of adventure, exploration, heartbreak, growth and inspiration.

programme.title: All In
programme.desc: ALL IN is a first of its kind experience. It's spearheaded by a group of women who want to disrupt the male-dominated ski film formula. This is a kick-ass film that happens to feature as many women as men because skiing isn't exclusionary.

programme.title: Tanner Hall Forever
programme.desc: At age 35, professional skier and seven-time X-Games champion Tanner Hall struggles to stay at the top of his sport, overcoming injuries and addiction to compete for his first time on the Freeride World Tour.

programme.title: Huck Yeah!
programme.desc: Matchstick Productions 2020 ski film is packed with the best skiers in the world charging hard and having fun in some of the most spectacular locations. Prepare to have your mind blown as these incredible skiers conquer the impossible.

programme.title: Romance
programme.desc: Romance, the final chapter by Level 1 captures a modern-day Golden Age in skiing. Featuring a generation of talent that came of age in the best time to ever do it. Tweaking the formula, tweaking the grab, and in it for nothing but the love.

programme.title: Return to Send'er
programme.desc: Four elite freeskiersa veteran, a rookie, an innovator and a big mountain skier carrying on his fathers legacyput together powerful, insightful individual segments before joining forces for the mother of all heliskiing trips.

programme.title: La Liste: Everything or Nothing
programme.desc: Jeremie Heitz and Sam Anthamatten display grace in the dangerous world of free-skiing. Follow them as they set off around the world to find the most awe-dropping, high-altitude peaks and mountain ranges that exceed 6000 metres.

programme.title: This Is Home
programme.desc: From Europe to the US and back again via old playgrounds, new challenges, secret spots and favourite lines THIS IS HOME chronicles what it means to be a freeskier today.

programme.desc: In the backwoods of BC, three small crews of adventure seekers quietly changed the course of a sport and carved their paths in history. And it was all happening unbeknownst to each other, the cycling world, and ultimately, themselves.

programme.title: The Trail to Kazbegi
programme.desc: “The Trail to Kazbegi” is a self-supported mountain-bike mission through the highest reaches of the Caucasus Mountains in the former Soviet Republic of Georgia. Our four-man team—adventure filmmaker Joey Schusler, Bike magazine editor Brice Minnigh, photographer Ross Measures and mountain man Sam Seward—spent half of June 2015 exploring the crown jewels of the Georgian High Caucasus on a feature assignment for Bike.

programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Secrets of the Caribbean
programme.desc: All aboard the triple-masted, wrought-iron hulled SV Mandalay for a historic voyage to the Caribbean with the S.O.C. team who uncover fascinating aspects of the region's history, culture, and people.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World
programme.sub-title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World: Mumbai, Copenhagen, Atlanta, Dublin, Houston, Luxor, New Orleans
programme.desc: Your first class ticket to the cities of the world. This series features large and small cities from around the world to reveal their icons, culture, tourist and hidden highlights with information about local customs, the cities personality and history.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Travel Thru History is a unique, Emmy nominated travel series that explores diverse cities and historical sites around the World while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations. From the oldest building in the Western Hemisphere to the famous French Quarter, a spectacular chain of islands off the Southern coast of Florida to the birthplace of California, the Travel Thru History series is a must see to learn about America's rich and fascinating history by traveling to amazing cities across the states. It explores diverse cities and historical sites while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations.

programme.title: Painting The Town
programme.desc: Folk artist Eric Dowdle travels across North America, meeting the local people, sampling food, learning about culture and touring local attractions in an effort to determine what makes each place unique. Each episode culminates in the creation of a piece of colorful folk art that symbolizes the place Dowdle has visited.

programme.title: Outta Town Adventures
programme.sub-title: South Vietnam: The Country, Not the War, Part 2
programme.desc: The south of Vietnam is quite different from the north. From Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon), we see the fertile land in which the ingredients of its marvelous cuisine are produced.

programme.title: Cayman Islands: Paradise
programme.desc: The Cayman Islands, nestled in the Caribbean Sea, were once a refuge for resolute bankers and have now opened up to tourism.

programme.title: Passport Heavy
programme.desc: The Passport Heavy team jets off to Tulum, recently crowned one of the top destinations for US travelers, to unravel the hype firsthand. This episode serves as your ultimate travel guide, addressing all your burning questions to ensure your Tulum journey is as seamless and enjoyable as possible. The beauty of Tulum lies in its versatility, catering to both the luxury seeker and the adventure enthusiast. Dive in with us to discover the myriad experiences Tulum offers!

programme.title: Secrets of the Caribbean
programme.desc: All aboard the triple-masted, wrought-iron hulled SV Mandalay for a historic voyage to the Caribbean with the S.O.C. team who uncover fascinating aspects of the region's history, culture, and people.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World
programme.sub-title: The World's Greatest Cities of The World: Mumbai, Copenhagen, Atlanta, Dublin, Houston, Luxor, New Orleans
programme.desc: Your first class ticket to the cities of the world. This series features large and small cities from around the world to reveal their icons, culture, tourist and hidden highlights with information about local customs, the cities personality and history.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Travel Thru History is a unique, Emmy nominated travel series that explores diverse cities and historical sites around the World while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations. From the oldest building in the Western Hemisphere to the famous French Quarter, a spectacular chain of islands off the Southern coast of Florida to the birthplace of California, the Travel Thru History series is a must see to learn about America's rich and fascinating history by traveling to amazing cities across the states. It explores diverse cities and historical sites while experiencing the cultural and archaeological features of these unique locations.

programme.title: Painting The Town
programme.desc: Folk artist Eric Dowdle travels across North America, meeting the local people, sampling food, learning about culture and touring local attractions in an effort to determine what makes each place unique. Each episode culminates in the creation of a piece of colorful folk art that symbolizes the place Dowdle has visited.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to Western Mongolian with nomadic Kazak herders who hunt using golden eagles in a tradition that dates back to well before the great Mongol Empire. That nomadic lifestyle and the traditions that come with it are trying to find their place in an ever-encroaching modern world.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to Western Mongolian with nomadic Kazak herders who hunt using golden eagles in a tradition that dates back to well before the great Mongol Empire. That nomadic lifestyle and the traditions that come with it are trying to find their place in an ever-encroaching modern world.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to Kyoto, one of the most well-preserved cities in Japan where both domestic and international tourists flock to stroll the streets to get a sense of ancient Japan. We spend time with a classic starving artist trying to make it in the art world, a tattoo artist breaking new ground in what is still a taboo art form, and a modern artist with pieces in major museums around the world.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to Puerto Rico to explore graffiti and mural culture. This is a surprising look at how something that is seen as a sign of blight, of a neighborhood in decline, is actually unifying neighborhoods around the island. The murals give residents a sense of history and pride as well as much needed income from tourists who are visiting these seldom-seen barrios to view the mural art.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to East Timor with writer Naldo Rei, who was instrumental in the 15-year bloody struggle for independence from Indonesia. Naldo and his fellow East Timorese are now looking towards an uncertain but hopeful future for a country with a lot of potential, including what Conservation International calls the most biodiverse swath of ocean right off the shore of their capital city.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: We travel to The Northern Coast of Australia to Arnhem Land, spending time with the Yolngu tribe – a group of people that some anthropologists date back to well over 30,000 years and who were instrumental in advancing the struggle for land rights for Aboriginals across Australia.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: While most of the world watched in shock when Russia invaded Ukraine, the artists, musicians, writers and keepers of culture in Ukraine rose to the challenge of defending their homeland in any way possible. This special episode looks at several of these people to see what inspired them to speak out, and what they want the rest of the world to see in their very real struggle for Ukraine's identity.

programme.title: Culture Quest with Ian Grant
programme.desc: While most of the world watched in shock when Russia invaded Ukraine, the artists, musicians, writers and keepers of culture in Ukraine rose to the challenge of defending their homeland in any way possible. This special episode looks at several of these people to see what inspired them to speak out, and what they want the rest of the world to see in their very real struggle for Ukraine's identity.
